vocab.meaning: thu hẹp (sự tập trung hoặc các lựa chọn)
vocab.example: A minimalist study space helps me narrow down my focus to the most urgent tasks at hand.
I always spend five minutes to tidy up my desk because a cluttered environment usually leads to a cluttered mind.

vocab.meaning: trở nên tươi tỉnh, năng động hơn
vocab.example: A well-ventilated room with plenty of natural light really helps me perk up during long afternoon study sessions.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn, không cho (âm thanh, sự xao nhãng) lọt vào
vocab.example: It is vital to have a quiet place where you can shut out the rest of the world and immerse yourself in books.

vocab.meaning: làm lộn xộn, gây nhầm lẫn
vocab.example: Without an organized filing system in my room, I often muddle up my lecture notes and lose track of my progress.

vocab.meaning: làm mới, làm cho sảng khoái (không gian hoặc tinh thần)
vocab.example: Adding a few indoor plants is a great way to freshen up your study area and reduce stress levels.

vocab.meaning: phân chia, định lượng (thời gian hoặc công sức)
vocab.example: A serene environment allows me to accurately measure out how much time I need for each complex problem.

vocab.meaning: làm mòn, làm giảm dần (sự kiên nhẫn hoặc năng lượng)
vocab.example: Constant background noise can slowly wear away your patience, making it impossible to study effectively.

vocab.meaning: dựa vào (một nơi chốn/nguồn lực dự phòng)
vocab.example: When my home gets too noisy, the local library is a reliable quiet zone that I can always fall back on.

vocab.meaning: tách biệt, phân ranh giới (một khoảng không gian)
vocab.example: I try to block off a specific corner of my apartment solely for academic work to create a mental boundary.
